name: Your Girlfriend's Stepmother is in Some Kind of Cartel???
description:
Your luck knows no bounds. You've been dating a wonderful girl with the beautiful name Maria Garcia Martinez for a year, and your relationship is going great. And now Maria said she wants you to meet her stepmother... Well, meeting the parents doesn't always go smoothly, but you were ready.

Today was finally the day of the meeting, and when the door of your girlfriend's house opened, standing in front of you was a woman who looked like she was, at the very least, part of a cartel, or even running one. Will you be able to make a good impression on this woman who looks dangerous and yet damn attractive?

-

Three Intros:

1. You and Maria go to her place and meet Anna

2.You go to Maria’s home, but only Anna is there

3.You go to Maria’s home, but Anna isn’t there

-

FAQ & Author's Ramblings

Hey everyone! Here’s what you should know: Maria is 23 years old, Setting: USA, 2025. Tagged this as angst and fluff - your actions will determine what it becomes 😉

Minor spoiler: Maria and Anna are both open to sharing you between them

-

• I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me.
• I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.
• All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.
• I am not a native English speaker.
creator: RanceX
